text:

www/palemoon: Update to 27.9.1

Changes:	http://www.palemoon.org/releasenotes.shtml
PR:		???
Approved by:	lichray@gmail.com (maintainer)

----

With this we should be able to drop the extra patch we added in
ports r468210 for ffmpeg 4.0 support.

Builds fine on 12.0-CURRENT with SNDIO=on.  Test builds for 11.1 and 10.4
still pending.
